name: Phase Grazer Velocity Assist
desc: Rapidly boost in any direction by double tapping the [WASD] keys.

name: Wanzer Amp Relay
desc: This craft contains a long range energy delivery system originally found on the Gust to boost performance of nearby strikecraft and frigates.

name: Wanzer Amp Relay (Dual)
desc: This craft contains a long range energy delivery system originally found on the Gust to boost performance of nearby strikecraft and frigates.

name: Feather Drone Screen
desc: Grants a permanent screen of 3 Feather drones that hold station in front of the ship and keep their shields raised.

name: Angelos Reactor Tuning
short: Drastic improvement in speed, maneuverability, and active venting speed, lower peak time.

name: Specialized Wanzer Microforge
desc:
This ship's microforges contain optimization protocols for production of smaller Wanzer and Aribitrator strikecraft. 

Grants the following effects to each installed Wanzer or Arbitrator wing based on it's initial wing size:

1 fighter: no benefit.

2 fighters: %s increased damage and %s less damage taken.

3+ fighters: %s.

These specialized facilities do not offer any tangible benefit nor drawback when operating regular fighters wings.
sModDesc: Once per combat, when the fighter replacement rate reaches %s, the fighter launch bays are switched to operate from a "B-deck". Standby fighters are launched to rapidly bring wings back to full strength, and the fighter replacement rate is set to %s.

name: Diable Engine Flicker Fix
desc: Changes engine glow from a flicker to a slow pulse.

name: Heavy Weapon Mount Integration
desc: The ship's weapon emplacements are designed around strengthened recoil dampeners, enabling projectile weapons to fire with a %s reduction in recoil. Also reduces the cost of Diable Avionics large ballistic and energy weapons by %s.

name: Angelos DRA Skin
short: Applies the DRA magic paintjob to this ship
